title: Verify the full cancellation flow without accepting the incentive offer
description: Test that a user can cancel their trial completely by declining all retention offers and that the UI updates correctly.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. If the 'Incentive' pop-up appears, click the secondary 'Cancel Anyway' option.
5. Close the feedback pop-up and observe the Trial Corner and Homepage widget.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately cancelled. Access to premium content is revoked. The Trial Corner and Homepage widget update to the 'cancelled trial' design, showing content sections as locked.
